case_title: ADOLFO CASTILLO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SF PUBLIC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY CASTILLO, ADOLFO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SF PUBLIC UTILITIES COMM,CWP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, ADOLFO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SF PUBLIC UTILITIES COMM,CWP $0 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION CWP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RYON HOWARD. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
